productDisplayName: Puma Women Speeder White Sports Shoes
description: A low profile jogging sneaker, the puma Speeder lives up to its name, offering great speed and traction with maximum comfort and grip on various terrain. Simple and style but great to look at, these shoes team well with jeans and tees for casual occasions too.
